maintenanceRequests.title: Screen flickering issue
maintenanceRequests.description: The laptop screen has vertical green lines and flickers heavily when adjusting the lid. It makes writing code impossible.

maintenanceRequests.title: Battery draining too fast
maintenanceRequests.description: Battery backup is less than 30 minutes on a full charge. Need a replacement battery.

maintenanceRequests.title: Broken armrest adjustment
maintenanceRequests.description: The left armrest of the chair is stuck in the lowest position and the lock switch is cracked. Need a repair or replacement armrest.
maintenanceRequests.rejectionReason: Damage appears to be due to misuse. Employee instructed to contact facilities directly for physical repair options.

maintenanceRequests.title: Engine coolant leak
maintenanceRequests.description: Coolant temperature warning light is glowing on dashboard. Checked under the hood and saw a slow drip near the radiator pipe hose.

maintenanceRequests.title: Projector lamp needs replacement
maintenanceRequests.description: The projector lamp indicator light is solid red and the display is extremely dim. Cannot use it for meetings.

maintenanceRequests.title: Periodic engine oil change
maintenanceRequests.description: Generator has completed 250 hours of running since last service. Oil filter and engine oil need replacement.
maintenanceRequests.resolutionNotes: Replaced engine oil, fuel filter, and oil filter. Cleaned air filters. Generator is tested and running fine.

maintenanceRequests.title: Display ports not working
maintenanceRequests.description: The HDMI port is loose and does not detect any input. DisplayPort works fine but HDMI is required for multi-source setup.

maintenanceRequests.title: Desk motor failure
maintenanceRequests.description: The electric standing desk motor is unresponsive when pressing the height adjustment buttons. The control screen shows error E03.

maintenanceRequests.title: Front brakes worn out
maintenanceRequests.description: Front brake lever on the scooter feels extremely loose and stopping distance has significantly increased. Brake pads need replacement.

maintenanceRequests.title: Hydraulic cylinder fluid leak
maintenanceRequests.description: Hydraulic fluid is leaking from the main lift cylinder mast of the forklift. The lift speed has dropped and it leaves oil stains.
maintenanceRequests.resolutionNotes: Replaced damaged hydraulic piston seals and refilled hydraulic fluid to standard level. Lift tested with 500kg load.
